ddls:
CREATE TABLE "job_postings" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job posting */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the job position */,
  "company" TEXT /* Name of the company offering the job */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the job */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the job was posted */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL linking to the job application page */,
  "current_status" TEXT /* Current status of the job posting (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the job posting (e.g., careers, recruitment agency) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the job role and responsibilities */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job category */,
  "salary_range" TEXT /* Salary range for the job */,
  "required_skills" TEXT /* Required skills for the job */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the job is categorized */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_company FOREIGN KEY ("company") REFERENCES companies ("company_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the company operates */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries regarding job postings */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the company */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Size of the company */,
  "company_type" TEXT /* Type of company (e.g., for-profit, non-profit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the candidate */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the candidate */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the candidate */,
  "resume_url" TEXT /* URL linking to the candidate's resume */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date when the candidate applied for the job */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the candidate */,
  "linkedin_profile" TEXT /* LinkedIn profile of the candidate */,
  "github_profile" TEXT /* GitHub profile of the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job posting the application pertains to */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate who submitted the application */,
  "application_status" TEXT /* Current status of the application (e.g., submitted, under review, accepted, rejected) */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was submitted */,
  "cover_letter" TEXT /* Cover letter submitted with the application */,
  "portfolio_url" TEXT /* URL linking to the candidate's portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the job category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the application status (e.g., submitted, under review, accepted, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., recruiter, candidate, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job view */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job posting that was viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who viewed the job posting */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the job posting was viewed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who viewed the job posting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_views_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job posting */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views for the job posting */,
  "applications" INTEGER /* Number of applications received for the job posting */,
  "date_collected" TEXT /* Date when the analytics data was collected */,
  "bounce_rate" TEXT /* Bounce rate for the job posting */,
  "time_to_hire" TEXT /* Time to hire for the job posting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate receiving the notification */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job posting related to the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Current status of the notification (e.g., sent, opened) */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., new_job_posting, application_status_update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interviews" (
  "interview_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interview */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job posting the interview pertains to */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate participating in the interview */,
  "interview_date" TEXT /* Date of the interview */,
  "interview_time" TEXT /* Time of the interview */,
  "interview_type" TEXT /* Type of interview (e.g., phone, in-person, video) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interview_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interviews_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interviews_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offers" (
  "offer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job offer */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job posting the offer pertains to */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate receiving the offer */,
  "offer_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the offer was extended */,
  "offer_status" TEXT /* Current status of the offer (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Salary offered to the candidate */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits included in the offer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offers_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offers_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)
